title: Movie Characters ORM Addon
description: This addon to OrigamiKings Robotics Armor Mod adds armors of the movie version
body:
# I am kinda done with modding so this mod is archived. I may get back to it one day.

# Movie Characters ORM Addon

This Addon to [OrigamiKings Robotics Armor Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origamikings-robotics-armor-mod) adds the movie versions from Hasbro’s Transformers. So far this addon mod only adds one armor. But more will come soon. Eventually, this mod will have a movie version for every armor in [ORM](https://modrinth.com/mod/origamikings-robotics-armor-mod).

## Copyright Stuff
**This mod has Transformers in it, Hasbro owns Transformers, not me**
